name: Git Manager
description: Failed CI + open PRs across your GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket accounts

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.hint: Personal access tokens are DPAPI-protected (per-Windows-user) before saving to config.

poll_interval_mins.label: Global poll cadence (minutes)
poll_interval_mins.hint: Floor for how often the background thread re-checks each account. Per-account poll_mins overrides this when larger.

ai_clis.label: AI assistants
ai_clis.hint: Which AI CLI to offer when sending a failure or PR for analysis. Pick one or more — the card's 'AI' button then lists exactly these.
